title: Event-Driven Next.js Backend
description: Build a production-grade Next.js backend with a type-safe API layer, relational database, background job queue, and serverless caching — all optimised for edge and serverless deployment.

steps.description: Set up Drizzle ORM with Postgres for the relational data layer
Add tRPC for fully type-safe API procedures shared between server and client
Add Zod for input validation on tRPC procedures and form schemas
Integrate Inngest for durable background jobs, cron tasks, and event fan-out
Add Upstash Redis for serverless caching and API rate limiting
Configure Vitest for unit and integration tests of API procedures and job handlers
Set up CI to run type checks, tests, and schema migrations on every push
